label: IoT Telemetry Publisher
info: Publish test telemetry to RabbitMQ MQTT plugin for the current IoT telemetry topology.

name: Setup
info:
RabbitMQ MQTT plugin through HAProxy: rabbitmq-lb:1883 inside Docker Compose
The backend routes MQTT topics through iot.telemetry.exchange.
Use topics like factory/telemetry/electricity/valid, factory/telemetry/steam/valid, and factory/telemetry/gas/valid.

name: Prepare Electricity Valid
Prepare Electricity Invalid
Prepare Electricity No Save
Prepare Electricity DB Error
Prepare Steam Valid
Prepare Gas Valid
